name: W20 CBAM Certificate Hash Collision Alert

parameters.subject: ={{'🔴 P0: CBAM Certificate Hash Collision — ' + $json.installationId}}

parameters.title: ={{'[P0] Certificate Hash Collision — ' + $json.installationId + ' — ' + $json.reportingPeriod}}
parameters.body:
=## 🔴 P0: CBAM Certificate Hash Collision

**Installation:** {{$json.installationId}}
**Period:** {{$json.reportingPeriod}}
**Expected Hash:** {{$json.expectedHash?.slice(0, 16)}}...
**Actual Hash:** {{$json.actualHash?.slice(0, 16)}}...
**Detected At:** {{$json.timestamp}}

**Auto-actions taken:**
- [x] Certificate signing disabled
- [x] PagerDuty alert triggered
- [x] Compliance Officer notified

**Manual actions required:**
- [ ] Audit hash generation pipeline
- [ ] Verify no data tampering
- [ ] Restore from cryptographic audit log
- [ ] Re-enable signing after Compliance Officer sign-off

parameters.subject: ={{'⚠️ CBAM Certificate Hash Non-Critical Alert — ' + $json.installationId}}
